validation_rules: run lake build in a temporary copy of the public fixture project
require local Lean and Lake toolchain availability receipts
record source file hashes, declaration names, and line counts without embedding proof bodies in JSON receipts
reject Mathlib, Aesop, and Batteries imports until a wider authority ceiling exists
reject private source refs in witness manifests
reject proof bodies embedded in JSON manifests or receipts
reject intentionally invalid Lean proof negative case
emit private-state scan and redacted receipts
receipt_expectations: receipt must cite source refs, source pattern ids, projection receipts, public replacements, toolchain command receipts, Lake build status, negative-case coverage, private-state scan, and anti-claim

allowed_public_inputs: Lake project metadata with no external dependencies
forbidden_public_inputs: Mathlib-dependent imports without a new authority ceiling

anti_claim: This standard governs only a bounded public Lean/Lake witness fixture. It does not authorize Mathlib-dependent proofs, provider calls, private proof import, benchmark performance claims, release/publication work, or theorem-program authority beyond the declared toy witnesses.

standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe Lean witness tranche: a tiny Lake project, local toolchain probe, temporary build, declaration metadata, redacted receipts, and leakage negative cases.
standard_payload.teleology: Let Microcosm honestly cross from formal-math readiness into a runnable local Lean proof witness while keeping proof authority narrow and auditable.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: Turning one toy Lean build into a broad theorem-proving or release-readiness claim.
failure_modes: receipt embeds proof body or provider payload

omission_receipt.reason: public tranche carries a tiny synthetic Lean source fixture and redacted build receipts only

anti_claim_contract.rule: Lean witness material must state that authority is limited to declared toy witnesses compiled locally

source_coupling_contract.rule: macro source refs stay pattern-level metadata and public replacements stay public-root relative
